[[af:Houttier (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gák-ìng]][[de:Holz-Tiger]][[hak:Kap-yìm]][[ja:甲寅]][[ko:갑인]][[vi:Giáp Dần]][[za:Gyapyinz]][[zh-min-nan:Kap-în]][[zh-yue:甲寅]][[zh:甲寅]]

'''Yang Wood Tiger also known as Kinoe-tora''' (甲寅, also known as '''Kōboku-no-Tora''' or '''Kōin''') is one of the combinations of the [[Sexagenary cycle]].

It is the 51st combination of the sexagenary cycle, following [[Yin Water Ox]] and preceding [[Yin Wood Rabbit]]. In [[Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory]], the [[Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] '''Kinoe''' (甲) represents Yang [[Wood (wuxing)|Wood (木)]], and the [[Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] '''Tora''' (寅) also represents Yang Wood, forming a [[Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)]].

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yang Wood Tiger (甲寅)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎyín
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 jan4
** Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Kinoe-tora
***Onyomi 1: koushin
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gapin (갑인)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Dần

==Years of Yang Wood Tiger==
After the Common Era, a year is a Kinoe-tora year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 54.

Before the Common Era, a year is a Kinoe-tora year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 7.

{| class="wikitable"
|+'''Kinoe-tora Years'''
|-
![[1st Millennium BC]]!![[1st Millennium AD]]!![[2nd Millennium AD]]!![[3rd Millennium AD]]
|-
|
*[[:en:967 BC|967 BC]]
*[[:en:907 BC|907 BC]]
*[[:en:847 BC|847 BC]]
*[[787 BC]]
*[[727 BC]]
*[[667 BC]]
*[[607 BC]]
*[[547 BC]]
*[[487 BC]]
*[[427 BC]]
*[[367 BC]]
*[[307 BC]]
*[[247 BC]]
*[[187 BC]]
*[[127 BC]]
*[[67 BC]]
*[[7 BC]]
|
*[[:en:54 AD|54 AD]]
*[[:en:114 AD|114 AD]]
*[[:en:174 AD|174 AD]]
*[[:en:234 AD|234 AD]]
*[[:en:294 AD|294 AD]]
*[[:en:354 AD|354 AD]]
*[[:en:414 AD|414 AD]]
*[[:en:474 AD|474 AD]]
*[[:en:534 AD|534 AD]]
*[[:en:594 AD|594 AD]]
*[[:en:654 AD|654 AD]]
*[[:en:714 AD|714 AD]]
*[[:en:774 AD|774 AD]]
*[[:en:834 AD|834 AD]]
*[[:en:894 AD|894 AD]]
*[[:en:954 AD|954 AD]]
|
*[[:en:1014 AD|1014 AD]]
*[[:en:1074 AD|1074 AD]]
*[[:en:1134 AD|1134 AD]]
*[[:en:1194 AD|1194 AD]]
*[[:en:1254 AD|1254 AD]]
*[[:en:1314 AD|1314 AD]]
*[[:en:1374 AD|1374 AD]]
*[[:en:1434 AD|1434 AD]]
*[[:en:1494 AD|1494 AD]]
*[[:en:1554 AD|1554 AD]]
*[[:en:1614 AD|1614 AD]]
*[[:en:1674 AD|1674 AD]]
*[[:en:1734 AD|1734 AD]]
*[[:en:1794 AD|1794 AD]]
*[[:en:1854 AD|1854 AD]]
*[[:en:1914 AD|1914 AD]]
*[[1974 AD]]
|
*[[:en:2034 AD|2034 AD]]
*[[2094 AD]]
*[[2154 AD]]
*[[2214 AD]]
*[[2274 AD]]
*[[2334 AD]]
*[[2394 AD]]
*[[2454 AD]]
*[[2514 AD]]
*[[2574 AD]]
*[[2634 AD]]
*[[2694 AD]]
*[[2754 AD]]
*[[2814 AD]]
*[[2874 AD]]
*[[2934 AD]]
*[[2994 AD]]
|}

=== Events ===
* [[Kaei]] 7 / [[Ansei]] 1 (1854) - [[Tora no Taihen]] - [[1854 Tōkai earthquake|Ansei Tōkai earthquake]], [[1854 Nankai earthquake|Ansei Nankai earthquake]]

==Months of Yang Wood Tiger==
In years where the last digit of the Western calendar is 3 or 8 (corresponding to the [[Heavenly Stems]] of Mizunoto (癸) or Tsuchinoe (戊)), the first month of the year is a Kinoe-tora month. However, this applies to the [[Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] or [[Solar term]] (from [[Lichun|Risshun]] to the day before [[Jingzhe|Keichitsu]]).

==Days of Yang Wood Tiger==
=== Selected Days ===
Kinoe-tora days are the second day of [[Hassen]] (excluding intercalary days).
== See Also ==
* [[Sexagenary cycle]]
* [[Heavenly Stems]]
* [[Earthly Branches]]

== References ==

{{wikidata link|Q904409}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
